mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD ( TITLE , CONTENTS , "COUNT" , WRITER , INDATE ) VALUES ( #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{contents, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{count, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{writer, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD SET TITLE=#{title} , CONTENTS=#{contents} WHERE IDX=#{idx}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.IDX as idx , A.TITLE as title , A.CONTENTS as contents , COALESCE(A."COUNT", 0) as "count" , A.WRITER as writer , A.INDATE as indate , B.USER_NAME as writerNm , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_REPLY X WHERE X.IDX = A.IDX) AS reply FROM TBL_BOARD A LEFT JOIN TBL_USER B ON A.WRITER = B.USER_ID WHERE 1=1
AND ( A.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR A.CONTENTS LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY A.IDX DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM TBL_BOARD A WHERE 1=1
AND ( A.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR A.CONTENTS LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )
SELECT USER_NAME FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND PASSWORD = #{password}
